subject: fix(debug): inline pill responsive width + session notes update
body:
Pre-framework inline debug panel in index.html had the same fixed
width:320px overflow bug as DebugPill.vue. Applied matching fix:
width:calc(100vw - 2rem);max-width:320px. Updated session notes
for current session.

Tags: debug, mobile, docs
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: debug-system
Semver: patch

title: inline pill responsive width + session notes update
